meaning: adj.自以为是的,逞能的,狂想的
examples: What a CONCEITED and heedless ass!
Slightly is the most conceited of the boys.
It was perhaps the most conceited song that any animal ever composed.
Cristiano has nothing to do with the conceited image everybody has of him.
There is a good chance that seven out of ten people you admire most in world history were conceited.
